Selected Work

What I've built.

Four projects across enterprise MarTech, financial services communications, and nonprofit brand design each driven by a real problem, a deliberate solution, and a measurable result.

01
Email Marketing HTML / CSS B2B Global
BNY · 2025

Global Email Template System

The Problem

Inconsistent email templates across Capital Markets, Treasury Services, ETFs, and Depositary Receipts — every team operating independently, eroding brand trust at scale.

What I Did

Partnered with an agency to build a scalable HTML/CSS component library: newsletters, product updates, quarterly reviews, and event invites — all QA tested and A/B validated across dark and light variants.

The Impact

+15% CTR lift post-launch. Five business units adopted the system, cutting production time and establishing one authoritative visual standard across global sends.

+15%CTR lift
5+Business units
GlobalAudience reach
◈
Multi-Team Scope
Partnered with teams across Capital Markets, Treasury Services, ETFs, Depositary Receipts, and broader corporate marketing to ensure templates served every business unit
◈
Component Library
Scalable HTML/CSS modules headers, content blocks, CTAs, footers covering newsletters, quarterly reviews, event invitations, and product updates
◈
Agency Partnership
Managed the external agency relationship end-to-end: briefing, QA, A/B testing, and final rollout across all verticals
◈
Dark & Light Variants
Both visual modes built to brand standard, giving teams flexibility while maintaining a single authoritative visual identity
02
UX & Copywriting Compliance Landing Page
BNY · 2024

Email Preference & Unsubscribe Center

The Problem

A single opt-out removed recipients from everything — blunt, compliance-risky, and bad UX. List attrition was higher than it needed to be.

What I Did

Designed and built a two-page preference center with dual-scope opt-out logic: individual lines of business vs. all BNY marketing. Wrote UX copy and built the experience to BNY brand standards end-to-end.

The Impact

Recipients got real choice. Unnecessary churn dropped, compliance was maintained, and the experience held up at a high-visibility brand touchpoint.

UXCopy & Design
GranularOpt-out control
CompliantLegal-approved
Before
After
Before · After Unsubscribe & Confirmation pages
03
MarTech Automation Events
BNY · 2025

ON24 Enterprise Rollout

The Problem

No standardised virtual event infrastructure — every webinar built from scratch, inconsistent branding, no post-event strategy, and high manual overhead.

What I Did

Led enterprise ON24 adoption across BNY. Built standardised templates, automated post-event Marketo nurture sequences, integrated Jeto for operational efficiency, and documented internal best practices.

The Impact

Virtual events went from one-off productions to a repeatable pipeline. Attendees stayed in the funnel post-event, and the Jeto integration cut manual work significantly across teams.

EnterpriseScale rollout
MarketoNurture automation
JetoWorkflow integration
◈
Standardised Templates
Reusable ON24 event templates enforcing consistent brand presentation across all webinars
◈
Post-Event Nurture
Automated Marketo sequences triggered by attendee behaviour to sustain engagement post-broadcast
◈
Jeto Integration
Reduced manual campaign intake and improved internal SLA consistency across the marketing team
◈
Best Practice Documentation
Internal playbooks enabling any team member to execute an ON24 event to brand standard
04
Brand Design Social Campaign Nonprofit
First Tech Fund · 2023

Brand & Recruitment Campaign

The Problem

First Tech Fund needed to recruit low-income NYC high schoolers — a demographic that responds to authenticity. Existing materials felt corporate and missed the mark.

What I Did

Designed the full recruitment suite — postcards, flyers, and digital assets in Adobe Illustrator — alongside a multi-channel social campaign and a full channel audit.

The Impact

+15% follower growth in 90 days. Consistent brand presence across channels helped First Tech Fund show up as credible and community-rooted to its target audience.

+15%Follower growth
